Title: Staff Data Scientist - Experimentation
Description:
Wallapop is a Barcelona based scale-up driven by the purpose to empower people to embrace a more conscious and human way of consumption. We believe in a world where collaborative economy is mainstream. This is what drives us💫.

Wallapop operates in Spain, Italy and Portugal, offering a catalogue of several hundreds of millions of products and services. Powered by technical innovation and continuous improvement, we bring together the scale & trust of classifieds with the marketplace’s convenience & reach. Our mission is to enable a connected trade ecosystem, making 2nd-hand the norm through smart use of technology.




The Challenge 🧩

We are seeking an experienced Experimentation lead who will own the evolution of Wallapop's experimentation practice. This person will define the company's experimentation standards, improve statistical rigor, increase the speed and quality of product decisions, and help Product teams adopt a culture of evidence-based decision making.

You will partner closely with Product, Engineering, Data Science, Analytics, and Executive leadership to ensure experiments are designed, executed, analyzed, and interpreted consistently across the organization. You will be both a hands-on expert and an internal consultant, helping teams answer critical questions about marketplace growth, personalization, search, discovery, trust & safety, monetization, and seller experiences.




What You Will Do👇

Experimentation Strategy: Define Wallapop's experimentation vision and roadmap, establish company-wide standards, create frameworks for experiment prioritization, and develop guardrail metrics and governance.
Statistical Excellence: Own methodology across the company and introduce advanced techniques (CUPED, sequential testing, network effect measurement, marketplace methods, quasi-experimental designs, and incrementally measurement) to reduce decision latency.
Product Partnership & Enablement: Act as a strategic advisor and coach to Data Analysts, Data Scientists, and PMs on hypothesis development, experiment design, and success metrics to raise overall experimentation maturity.
Education: Build Wallapop's experimentation curriculum, deliver training programs for PMs, Designers, Engineers, and Analysts, and establish playbooks and office hours.
Platform & Tooling: Partner with Data Engineering and Analytics Engineering to improve infrastructure, evolve Amplitude Experiment data practices, and define quality standards for exposure logging.
Marketplace Optimization: Design experimentation approaches for search ranking, recommendations, personalization, marketplace liquidity, supply-demand dynamics, seller growth, trust & safety, and ads monetization.




What We’re Looking For 🔍

Technical Expertise:8+ years of total experience in data science, product analytics, or causal inference, including at least 4 years deeply focused on experimentation (experimental design, statistical inference, A/B testing, and variance reduction).
Tooling & Code: Strong SQL proficiency along with experience using Python or R.
Product Partnership: Proven ability to partner directly with Product organizations and influence senior stakeholders using strong business judgment.
Leadership: Demonstrated success building experimentation cultures, experience coaching PMs and analysts, and excellent communication skills.




What Would Be A Plus 🚀

Experience in Amplitude
Experience working in marketplaces, e-commerce, consumer internet, or two-sided platforms.
Experience with recommendation systems or search systems.




Do note that all our jobs are 📍 Barcelona based. We follow a hybrid model where flexibility rules. We commit to a minimum of 6 days per month in the office. Each team self-organizes to decide on cadence and in-person/remote rituals.

Wallapop is an equal-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees as we want Wallapop to be a place for everyone.

We sponsor visa processes for international candidates when applicable and provide legal & admin support along the process combined with a competitive relocation package.




Additionally to the opportunity to contribute to an agile product set up and work together towards achieving our meaningful mission, we offer the following 🍭 Perks & Benefits:

Generous individual learning budget of 2K per year
Free office meals, lunch selection from different providers
Group and individual English, Catalan & Spanish lessons as part of our working day
Private Health Insurance with Alan
Flexible working hours + intensive Fridays
Flexible remuneration to deduct from gross salary (kindergarten/food/transport check)
Gym & Wellness plan, including physiotherapist in the office
Generous referral Program & Charity Donation
Bonus for weddings & newborns
Wallapop Renta (Tax income support)
Monthly product advantages (Wallapop Club)
Work anniversary Gifts and Birthday Surprises
Contribution towards your WIFI in your monthly payroll
One-off payment based on compensation package to go towards setting up your home office
Relocation package (monetary support and legal advice) and visa sponsorship, if applicable
26 holidays per year
TOP hardware of your choice (latest Apple or Windows)




What does the hiring process for this position look like? 👀 **Please, note that all interviews take place remotely over hangouts.**

Intro Call - run by talent acquisition, focus on providing more information about the role and the company as well as going over your experience, motivation, and expectations. This usually takes 45-60 minutes.

Task - you will be assigned a task to submit within 5 up to 7 days where you will be able to showcase your expertise and technical skills required for the role.

Expertise Interview - run by the hiring team, focus on the required core skills and the ability to deliver in a given context. This usually takes 60-90 minutes.

Stakeholder Interview - run by relevant stakeholders reflecting the reality of the context of the role, focus on the ability to collaborate & deliver in a cross-functional set-up. This usually takes 60 minutes.

Culture Interview - run by culture interviewers, focus on adherence to Wallapop's purpose and business proposition. This usually takes 60 minutes.

Offer - should you be the right candidate, your offer will be discussed over a call with talent acquisition and will then be confirmed in writing.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Job Description

We are looking for an exceptional Data Analyst to join the Coches.Net, Motos.Net and Milanuncios.com team. You will work as a member of multidisciplinary team, collaborating closely with Product owners, cluster teams, data engineers and management team stake-holders (Marketing, Sales, Product, BizDev and other Operations teams).

Your main mission is to define and execute analyses of several business context to identify trends, opportunities and problems to improve the offering and services we offer.

Job Requirements


3+ years of experience in eCommerce, an online company.
Advanced knowledge of SQL and relational databases
Advanced knowledge of Python and/or R for data analysis (e.g. pandas, numpy, matplotlib), and advanced analytics (e.g. scikit-learn)
Advanced user of at least one visualisation tool such as Tableau and/or QlikSense.
Analytical skills: know how to interpret data, to extract relevant insights and be able to translate business questions into analytical needs Nice-to-have
Experience working with sales, operations, and strategy teams.
Good knowledge of basic machine learning algorithms (e.g. clustering, classification, regressions)


Nice To Have


Experience working with sales, operations, and strategy teams.
Good knowledge of basic machine learning algorithms (e.g. clustering, classification, regressions)
Some experience with big data technology (e.g. databricks, datalakes)
Some knowledge of data engineering tools (e.g. Airflow, DBT)


Job Responsibilities


Identify, analyse and interpret KPIs and Health Metrics related to our users and customers, creating dashboard and visualisation to monitor them.
Identifying trends, risks and opportunities to provide insights that can make recommendations on how to improve the different initiatives of the vertical.
Create powerful Insights using Advanced analytics to improve the knowledge of our users and customers.
Actively participate in the discovery, and development of advanced analytical models (such as clustering, and predictive models), into their implementation in business use cases, such as customer segmentation, and propensity models for upselling, downselling, and churn prediction.

Title: Científico/a de Datos / Machine Learning / Deep Learning
Description:
Senior Data Scientist – Machine Learning / Deep Learning | Madrid | Híbrido




En Indra Group, protegemos lo que más importa.

Somos una compañía global líder en tecnología y consultoría, presente en más de 140 países, que desarrolla soluciones innovadoras en sectores críticos como Defensa, Espacio y Transporte. Nuestro propósito es crear un futuro más seguro, eficiente y sostenible mediante la tecnología.




💻 ¡Únete a nuestro equipo de proyectos europeos en el área de Desarrollo Avanzado de Inteligencia Artificial! Trabajarás en iniciativas estratégicas aplicando modelos avanzados de machine learning, deep learning y tecnologías punteras para reforzar la capacidad tecnológica en entornos críticos.




💡 ¿Qué harás?

• Diseñar, desarrollar y optimizar modelos de machine learning y deep learning para diferentes casos de uso del proyecto.

• Implementar soluciones avanzadas en Python utilizando librerías fundamentales como NumPy, pandas, scikit-learn o SciPy.

• Entrenar, ajustar y evaluar arquitecturas neuronales (Transformers, RNN, LSTM, GRU) en frameworks como TensorFlow, PyTorch o Keras.• Aplicar técnicas de NLP con herramientas como Hugging Face Transformers y spaCy.

• Realizar fine-tuning de modelos de lenguaje (LLMs) como GPT, BERT y variantes.

• Participar en la integración de modelos dentro de plataformas MLOps (Kubeflow, BentoML).

• Colaborar en la contenedorización y despliegue de servicios mediante Docker y Kubernetes.

• Contribuir a actividades de investigación aplicada y experimentación en IA avanzada.

• Documentar procesos, resultados y conclusiones en informes técnicos.




🎯 ¿Qué buscamos en ti? (Requisitos imprescindibles)

✅ Titulación superior en informática, telecomunicaciones, ingeniería de software, física, matemáticas u otra ingeniería afín.

✅ Mínimo 3 años de experiencia como Data Scientist trabajando con machine learning o deep learning.

✅ Dominio avanzado de Python y librerías de ciencia de datos (NumPy, pandas, scikit-learn, SciPy).

✅ Experiencia con frameworks de deep learning como TensorFlow, PyTorch o Keras.

✅ Conocimientos de arquitecturas neuronales (Transformer, RNN, LSTM, GRU).

✅ Nivel de inglés alto.




No te preocupes si no cumples el 100% de lo que buscamos. ¡Anímate, conoce nuestra propuesta y dinos lo que nos puedes aportar! 🚀




Lo que te ofrecemos

• Estabilidad y Futuro 🏢✨: Proyectos a largo plazo en una empresa líder de Defensa

• Proyectos Innovadores y de Alto Alcance 🚀: Trabajarás con tecnologías de vanguardia, con un impacto tanto a nivel nacional como internacional.

• Ambiente Cercano y Transparente 🤝: Disfrutarás de una comunicación directa y fluida con responsables y compañeros, en un entorno colaborativo y abierto.

• Autonomía y Flexibilidad ⏳: conciliación real y adaptada a tu ritmo.

• Plan de carrera adaptado a ti 📈: Diseñado para impulsar tu crecimiento y desarrollo

• Formación continua 📚: en Open University y Udemy (¡más de 6.000 cursos para especializarte!).

En Indra Group, protegemos lo que más importa.

Somos una compañía global líder en tecnología y consultoría, presente en más de 140 países, que desarrolla soluciones innovadoras en sectores críticos como Defensa, Espacio y Transporte. Nuestro propósito es crear un futuro más seguro, eficiente y sostenible mediante la tecnología.


💻 ¡Únete a nuestro equipo de proyectos europeos en el área de Desarrollo Avanzado de Inteligencia Artificial! Trabajarás en iniciativas estratégicas aplicando modelos avanzados de machine learning, deep learning y tecnologías punteras para reforzar la capacidad tecnológica en entornos críticos.


💡 ¿Qué harás?

• Diseñar, desarrollar y optimizar modelos de machine learning y deep learning para diferentes casos de uso del proyecto.

Title: Data Science & ML
Description:
¿Te apasiona desarrollar modelos de Machine Learning que generen un impacto real en el negocio?




Buscamos un/a Senior Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer para incorporarse a un equipo internacional de datos, participando en el desarrollo de soluciones basadas en inteligencia artificial y modelos predictivos que apoyan la toma de decisiones estratégicas.




Trabajarás en todo el ciclo de vida del modelo, desde el análisis de datos y la experimentación hasta el despliegue y monitorización en producción, colaborando estrechamente con perfiles técnicos y de negocio.




¿Qué harás?

Diseñar, entrenar y optimizar modelos de Machine Learning para resolver problemas de negocio.
Desarrollar modelos predictivos y algoritmos de clasificación, regresión y forecasting.
Realizar análisis exploratorios e ingeniería de variables para mejorar el rendimiento de los modelos.
Participar en el despliegue de modelos en producción y su monitorización.
Colaborar con equipos de Data Engineering y negocio para transformar necesidades funcionales en soluciones basadas en datos.
Medir el impacto de los modelos mediante métricas técnicas y de negocio.




Buscamos personas con experiencia en:

Más de 4 años trabajando como Data Scientist o Machine Learning Engineer.
Python y SQL.
Machine Learning clásico (Scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM o similares).
Modelos de regresión, clasificación y forecasting.
Desarrollo y despliegue de modelos en entornos productivos.
Docker y herramientas relacionadas con el ciclo de vida del modelo (MLflow, CI/CD o similares).
Cloud (Azure, AWS o GCP).

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
About BizAway

Here at BizAway, we Deliver the Future of Travel. 😎

We are a solid international company with strong ambitions and great expertise. With a focus on sustainability 🌱, on a daily basis we support companies enabling them to improve their travel management through our constantly evolving services and solutions, always characterized by our tech attitude and smart and innovative processes. 🚀

We know that success comes from People and deserves to be recognized.👫Proactivity and

Reliability, Kind collaboration, and communication are the core values of our Solution Culture.

If you like challenges and would love to be part of one of the fastest-growing B2B scale-ups, then BizAway is the company you have been looking for. 🤩

We are looking for

We are looking for a driven and enthusiastic Data Scientist (m/w/d) , who desires to contribute to the growth and success of our Data & Analytics Team.

Your role in BizAway


You design, build, and improve analytical and predictive solutions, from statistical models to reporting and dashboards, turning findings into clear, actionable insights through charts, graphs, and dashboards.
You learn all aspects of the travel industry from Finance, Products, Sales, and Service/Operations perspectives, translating data into actionable insights and verifiable reporting, and identifying opportunities where machine learning or automation can add value.
By developing domain expertise in our industry, you engage with Business and Strategy stakeholders to help define KPIs and metrics, including how data will be captured, shared, modeled, and leveraged across our departments.
You contribute to building the foundations of a comprehensive source of truth through data modeling, and you help prototype and operationalize data science use cases (e.g., forecasting, segmentation, recommendation).


Your Basic Qualifications


Previously worked in a Tech Company
Demonstrated experience with Python (or R) for data analysis and modeling
Working knowledge of core machine learning concepts and common libraries (e.g., pandas, scikit-learn)
Demonstrated experience with BI Data Visualization tools (Qlik preferred)
Data analysis, presentation, and visualization experience
Strong communication skills required
Ability to work alone or in a team as required
Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Engineering, Economics, or a related field is preferred
English proficiency (written and spoken, level B2)


We are also interested in


Exposure to ML deployment, MLOps, or cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
Familiarity with generative AI / LLMs and their applied use cases
Experience working with large or unstructured datasets


Our offer

📄 Contract type: Permanent

🕓 Working hours: Full-time – 40h/week, from Monday to Friday

🏢 Hybrid setting, flexible working policy, and great offices in Europe

💰 Salary: Attractive compensation, including equity in the company

💼 Equity in the company (stock options plan)

✈️ A seat on a scale-up with skyrocketing growth

📈 Development of your entrepreneurial spirit, having the chance to implement real-impact business decision

🌍Multicultural and international team

🙌Collaborative and smart environment to work and learn

🍻Free coffee to kick-start your day and free beers to celebrate together

BizAway avoids any discrimination based on age, gender, sexual orientation, health status, nationality, political opinions, and religious beliefs in all decisions affecting personnel selection.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Who we are. What we do.

We are Bystronic - a global technology company passionate about shaping the future of industrial manufacturing. We want to work with people who support us in creating new possibilities for connected sustainable production worldwide.

As a leading provider of solutions for sheet metal and material processing, we combine laser cutting technology, press brakes, automation, and software with innovative laser applications for new materials and processes.

Bystronic Software. The digital future of sheet metal processing.

In this role, you will join our Bystronic Software team. With our software solutions, developed specifically for the sheet metal processing industry, we enable companies to digitize their entire processes - from the initial quote to the final delivery.

We are looking for a Data Scientist passionate about data, advanced analytics and turning information into strategic decisions. You will work closely with product, engineering and business teams to develop data-driven solutions that create real impact.

What you will be doing

• Analyze large volumes of data to identify patterns, trends and opportunities.

• Design, develop and maintain predictive models and machine learning algorithms.

• Clean, transform and validate data from multiple sources.

• Create dashboards and reports to support business decision-making.

• Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to define metrics and KPIs.

• Present findings and recommendations clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

• Automate analytical processes and data pipelines.

• Explore new techniques and tools related to AI and data science.

Your education & experience

• Bachelor's or Master's degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Physics, Engineering or a related field.

• 4+ years of experience in Data Science, advanced analytics or similar roles.

• Experience applying statistical modelling, machine learning and data visualization in business contexts.

What you need to succeed

• Strong command of Python or R.

• Experience with libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow or PyTorch.

• Solid SQL knowledge and experience working with databases.

• Experience with data visualization tools such as Qlik, Tableau, Looker or similar.

• Strong understanding of statistics and machine learning.

• Familiarity with Azure cloud environments.

• Analytical thinking, business orientation and strong data storytelling skills.

• Proactive mindset and ability to solve complex problems in collaboration with others.

What sets you apart

• Experience with MLOps.

• Knowledge of NLP or Computer Vision.

• Experience working with Big Data technologies such as Spark, Hadoop or Databricks.

• Excellent English communication skills, both spoken and written.

What's in it for you

• A hybrid work model connected to our offices in Bilbao, Derio and Vitoria.

• Flexible working schedule and reduced working hours during summer.

• Individual learning and development programs, including language courses, Microsoft certifications and participation in technical conferences.

• Multidisciplinary teams with diverse skills, perspectives and backgrounds working in agile ways.

• The opportunity to create real impact in the sheet metal industry and help shape the digital factory of the future.

• Salary and benefits aligned with the market and your experience.

People power our purpose

Imagine working in an environment that helps move the company to the next level, where your passion, values, and skills are integral to impacting industrial manufacturing and beyond. At Bystronic, this can become your reality. Our people are the edge to drive and nurture our ambitions and continued success. Together we have created a culture where our people are central, inspiring us to make decisions that best serve them and are aligned with our purpose. As much as we are in a technology business, human beings drive real change.




Life at Bystronic

Explore our careers page to learn more about how we work:

https://www.bystronic.com/int/en/career/why-join/employee-stories

• 4+ years of experience in Data Science, advanced analytics or similar roles.

• Experience applying statistical modelling, machine learning and data visualization in business contexts.

What you need to succeed

• Strong command of Python or R.

• Experience with libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow or PyTorch.

• Solid SQL knowledge and experience working with databases.

• Experience with data visualization tools such as Qlik, Tableau, Looker or similar.

• Strong understanding of statistics and machine learning.

• Familiarity with Azure cloud environments.

• Analytical thinking, business orientation and strong data storytelling skills.

• Proactive mindset and ability to solve complex problems in collaboration with others.

What sets you apart

• Experience with MLOps.

• Knowledge of NLP or Computer Vision.

• Experience working with Big Data technologies such as Spark, Hadoop or Databricks.

• Excellent English communication skills, both spoken and written.

What's in it for you

• A hybrid work model connected to our offices in Bilbao, Derio and Vitoria.

• Flexible working schedule and reduced working hours during summer.

• Individual learning and development programs, including language courses, Microsoft certifications and participation in technical conferences.

• Multidisciplinary teams with diverse skills, perspectives and backgrounds working in agile ways.

• The opportunity to create real impact in the sheet metal industry and help shape the digital factory of the future.

• Salary and benefits aligned with the market and your experience.

People power our purpose

Imagine working in an environment that helps move the company to the next level, where your passion, values, and skills are integral to impacting industrial manufacturing and beyond. At Bystronic, this can become your reality. Our people are the edge to drive and nurture our ambitions and continued success. Together we have created a culture where our people are central, inspiring us to make decisions that best serve them and are aligned with our purpose. As much as we are in a technology business, human beings drive real change.


Life at Bystronic

Explore our careers page to learn more about how we work:

https://www.bystronic.com/int/en/career/why-join/employee-stories

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Minsait Business Consulting (MBC), firma de Indra Group, impulsa la tranformación de nuestros clientes a través de la consultoría de negocio y de operaciones en el ámbito Data.

Queremos que tú seas parte de esa transformación.




Sobre el equipo y tu impacto

En MBC Data contamos con un equipo global de 150 profesionales con un perfil que combina habilidades en analítica avanzada con un profundo conocimiento del negocio; nuestro propósito en el área se centra en la definición y desarrollo de soluciones informacionales ligadas a negocio; este propósito lo estructuramos alrededor de 5 dimensiones:

Modelado del dato
Reporting
Inteligencia de negocio
Data Governance
Estrategia y transformación







🎯 ¿Qué buscamos en ti?

Experiencia en proyectos de Data Science o puestos similares.
Formación en disciplinas cuantitativas (Matemáticas, Estadística, Física, Ingeniería, Informática o similares).
Programación en Python (conocimiento sobre las librerías más habituales Pandas, NumPy, Pydantic, scikit-learn)
Conocimientos en Pyspark y SQL
Se valorará experiencia en proyectos de aprendizaje automático o análisis predictivo
Deseable experiencia en sector bancario
Al menos nivel B2 de inglés.







💼 ¿Por qué ser parte del equipo MBC Data?

Trabajarás con buena gente, brillante y sentirás el respaldo de la empresa, así como el apoyo de los managers y roles superiores. Nos apoyamos para crecer y aprender juntos.
Participarás de un plan de carrera ambicioso con evaluaciones semestrales como incentivo para seguir desarrollándote; además tendrás la oportunidad de aprender, liderar, y desarrollar habilidades con exposición a clientes y autonomía en la ejecución de tus actividades.
Este sistema de evaluaciones semestrales es transparente, conocerás desde el inicio las reglas del juego.
Cultura con claro enfoque hacia las personas, respeto por el medio ambiente, impacto social y que fomenta de la igualdad de género.
Pasión por los resultados.
Trabajarás con clientes Tier1 implicándote en proyectos interesantes: Agregarás valor y soluciones a las problemáticas de los clientes.







Lo que MBC te ofrece

🌟 Crecimiento y desarrollo profesional

Evaluaciones semestrales y revisión salarial basada en desempeño.
Formación en herramientas digitales (Data, IA, etc.)
Programa de intercambio internacional MBC ICE para trabajar en proyectos globales.
Mentoring y acompañamiento para maximizar tu potencial.
Exposición a clientes IBEX 35.

💡 Beneficios exclusivos

Modelo de trabajo híbrido.
Tarde libre en tu cumpleaños.
Seguro médico 100% cubierto por MBC.
Internet gratuito.
Ayuda al deporte.
Retribución flexible: tarjeta restaurante, transporte, formación, guardería, plan de pensiones, renting de vehículos eléctricos.
Acceso a TherapySide, plataforma de bienestar.

🤝 Cultura y equipo

Un entorno dinámico, diverso y colaborativo donde la innovación y la excelencia son clave.
Eventos de team building, afterworks y actividades deportivas.
Iniciativas ThePlaceToBe y voluntariado Grupo Indra con impacto en personas, medio ambiente y tecnología.
Respeto, diversidad e igualdad de oportunidades como pilares fundamentales de nuestra cultura.

📩 ¿Ready para asumir este reto? ¡Únete a MBC y haz historia en el mundo de los datos!

MBC, the place to be!

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
MLOps Engineer




En Shakers colaboramos con una de las principales multinacionales del sector retail para incorporar un/a MLOps Engineer que lidere la evolución y escalado de su plataforma de Machine Learning a nivel global. Un rol con impacto real, entorno enterprise y equipo técnico de primer nivel.




El reto

Serás pieza clave en la construcción y mantenimiento de una infraestructura de ML robusta y escalable. Tu día a día combinará el diseño de pipelines en Databricks, la gestión de despliegues en Kubernetes en entornos productivos y la implementación de buenas prácticas de MLOps que marquen el ritmo técnico del proyecto. Trabajarás en estrecha colaboración con equipos de Data Science y Producto, con visibilidad directa sobre la hoja de ruta tecnológica.




Requisitos

Experiencia: 4–7+ años en MLOps o ML Platform Engineering
Cloud: Experiencia sólida en AWS
Plataforma ML: Experiencia práctica con Databricks + MLflow (Model Serving incluido)
Orquestación: Conocimiento profundo de Kubernetes en producción
CI/CD: Experiencia con Jenkins y automatización de despliegues de modelos




Se valora

Experiencia en arquitecturas distribuidas
Exposición a proyectos de GenAI
Experiencia adicional en Azure o GCP




¿Por qué este proyecto?

Impacto global desde el primer día en una plataforma ML de escala enterprise
Entorno técnico senior con autonomía real
Proyecto a largo plazo




Si esto encaja con tu perfil o con alguien de tu entorno, ¡aplica o comparte! Nos ponemos en contacto enseguida 🙌




#MLOps #MachineLearning #Databricks #Kubernetes #AWS #MLflow #FreelanceTech #RemoteWork #Shakers

Title: Junior Data Scientist
Description:
Nuestro objetivo es ayudar a todos los recién graduados del mundo a encontrar el trabajo que más se ajuste a sus ambiciones: ¡únete a nosotros para hacer realidad las aspiraciones de una comunidad de más de 1,500,000 usuarios!




Observamos constantemente los recursos de los estudiantes y egresados que aspiran a incorporarse a nuestro equipo de Tecnología: los candidatos para este puesto y nuestro equipo de RRHH se pondrán en contacto contigo sin comunicar puesto y tu CV será el adecuado a tu perfil.




Para estas posiciones junior en el sector Tech, ofrecemos un contrato con una remuneración anual de 24.000€ a 28.000 €, dependiendo de la experiencia. Podrás trabajar en modalidad completamente remota y, por ello, te proporcionaremos en cualquier momento un MacBook de última generación.




¡Nos vamos a España! Si quieres sumarte a crecer en tu país, envía tu CV para este anuncio: si tu perfil está en alguno de nuestros futuros puestos, nos pondremos en contacto contigo ;)

--




Dentro del equipo de Tecnología podrás abordar diversas tareas como:




Implementación de algoritmos de Machine Learning: tendrá la oportunidad de implementar y probar algoritmos de aprendizaje automático, ayudando a desarrollar soluciones inteligentes a los desafíos comerciales. En particular, junto con nuestro equipo tecnológico, trabajarás en Joinrs AI: nuestro modelo de Inteligencia Artificial que ayuda a nuestra comunidad a encontrar trabajo;
Análisis y modelado de datos: participará en el análisis de datos, desarrollará modelos predictivos y ayudará a proporcionar información significativa para mejorar las decisiones comerciales.
Visualización de datos: aprenderá a crear visualizaciones de datos claras e informativas para comunicar de manera efectiva hallazgos complejos a diferentes partes interesadas. En particular, creará paneles interactivos para mostrar mejor los datos y KPI (visualización de datos) al equipo, los clientes, los inversores y todas las partes interesadas clave;
Optimización de Procesos de Negocio: Colaborarás en la identificación y optimización de procesos de negocio mediante la aplicación de soluciones basadas en datos.
Participación en Sesiones de Brainstorming Tecnológico: Participarás en sesiones de Brainstorming para generar ideas innovadoras y contribuirás a la identificación de nuevas oportunidades en el campo de la Inteligencia Artificial.
Formación Continua y Actualización en las Últimas Tendencias: Tendrás acceso a programas de formación continua para mantenerte actualizado sobre las últimas tendencias y avances en el campo de la Ciencia de Datos y la Inteligencia Artificial.

--




Lo que te ofrecemos

Trabajar en el equipo de Joinrs significa poder elegir siempre las mejores condiciones psicofísicas para estar sereno y productivo. Esto se traduce en:




Trabajo remoto y flexibilidad. Tendrás la oportunidad de trabajar completamente a distancia todo el tiempo que desees, pero también apoyarte en una de nuestras oficinas.
Ambiente de trabajo dinámico. Nuestras oficinas siempre están abiertas. Te garantizamos espacios de trabajo compartidos, salas de reuniones, áreas de descanso y un bar con frutas frescas y aperitivos de todo tipo. También encontrarás una mesa de billar y una estación de juegos. Queremos un ambiente de trabajo informal que fomente momentos de compartir, siempre respetando las actividades individuales.
Team building y diversión. Organizamos a menudo aperitivos, juegos y momentos de recreo: son parte integral de la vida en Joinrs, tanto fuera como dentro de la oficina.
Bienestar empresarial. Te garantizamos un bienestar empresarial privado a la altura de tus expectativas.
Paquete tecnológico. Utilizarás software avanzado y tecnologías modernas, y se te proporcionará un MacBook de última generación.
Formación. Siempre contarás con un tutor en tu trayectoria en Joinrs: tendrás un punto de referencia tanto para los aspectos técnicos como para los del equipo. Te aseguramos un crecimiento profesional constante que se traducirá en un aumento progresivo de tus responsabilidades. Podrás participar en eventos del sector y cursos de formación, además de recibir formación continua en las mejores plataformas de aprendizaje en línea.
Impacto social. Tu contribución apoyará a miles de recién graduados a encontrar el trabajo al que aspiran: tendrás la oportunidad de interactuar con nuestra comunidad y descubrir el impacto social y la revolución que estamos llevando más allá de las fronteras italianas.

--




Quiénes somos

Nuestra misión es apoyar a cada recién graduado a lograr sus aspiraciones, permitiéndole comenzar su nueva carrera con el optimismo de una perspectiva clara.




Somos un equipo unido que cree firmemente en el trabajo en equipo: juntos trabajamos, discutimos y obtenemos resultados que nos estimulan a alcanzar objetivos cada vez más ambiciosos.




Nuestra comunidad cuenta con más de 1,500,000 miembros en Italia, Reino Unido, España, Brasil, Francia, Portugal y Alemania, incluyendo 700 empresas como PwC, Accenture, Gi Group, Danone, Siemens, y está creciendo de manera exponencial: ¡únete a nosotros!

--




Contrato y Remuneración:

Para todos los puestos de Junior Data Scientist ofrecemos un contrato con un salari anualo de €24,000 a €28.000.




Se programará una revisión salarial cada seis meses, y tu remuneración crecerá rápidamente a medida que acumules experiencia y la traduzcas en un impacto cada vez mayor.

--




Proceso de selección:

1. Revisión del CV: el primer paso es una revisión del currículum (generalmente dentro de los 20 días posteriores a la solicitud).

2. Entrevista telefónica: el segundo paso incluirá una entrevista telefónica con nuestro Gerente de Recursos Humanos de aproximadamente 15 minutos.

3. Entrevista por video: el último paso será una entrevista por video con tanto el Gerente de Recursos Humanos como tu futuro supervisor. Prevemos al menos 45 minutos de entrevista.

--




¿Por qué unirte a nuestro equipo?

Impacto social: tendrás la oportunidad de apoyar a nuestra comunidad para que logren sus aspiraciones. Y las tuyas.

Startup exitosa: Joinrs fue seleccionada entre las 10 mejores startups del mundo en la Web Summit de Lisboa.

Crecimiento personal exponencial: tendrás la oportunidad de crecer de manera exponencial, tanto en habilidades técnicas como en habilidades blandas, gracias a un programa de formación basado en la capacitación en el trabajo y el apoyo en línea.

Title: Data Scientist (Credit)
Description:
About Revolut

People deserve more from their money. More visibility, more control, and more freedom. Since 2015, Revolut has been on a mission to deliver just that. Our powerhouse of products — including spending, saving, investing, exchanging, travelling, and more — help our 75+ million customers get more from their money every day.

As we continue our lightning-fast growth,‌ 2 things are essential to our success: our people and our culture. In recognition of our outstanding employee experience, we've been certified as a Great Place to Work™. People who love building great products, redefining success, and turning the complexity of a chaotic world into the simplicity of a beautiful solution.

About The Role

Our Data Science team solves complex problems with smart, practical solutions. Data Scientists and Analysts work directly with product teams to uncover insights, guide decisions, and improve how customers experience Revolut. They do this by delivering smart, scalable solutions that move the business forward.

We’re looking for a Data Scientist to lead analytics over our credit and lending features. You'll provide insight into how we can deliver more value to customers while collaborating with professionals in Product, Design, and Engineering on impactful projects that drive our company’s growth.

Up to shape what's next in finance? Let's get in touch.

What You’ll Be Doing


Improving existing algorithms
Building new PoCs
Delivering data-driven solutions to enhance product performance
Researching and developing PoCs into scalable data products
Collaborating with Product Owners, Engineers, and Data Scientists to continually solve complex data problems


What You'll Need


Experience building and leading a data science team within a scaling organisation
Expertise in developing credit models

Knowledge of data science tools, including Python, SQL, and production frameworks
Familiarity with probability and statistics fundamentals
The ability to think strategically and diagnose problems accurately
Experience productionising research into scalable solutions
Excellent communication and collaboration skills to partner with Product Owners and senior stakeholders

An advanced degree in a quantitative discipline (master's or PhD)
Experience with additional programming languages, such as Java, Scala, or C++

Title: Data Science & AI Graduate
Description:
Overview

About PepsiCo

PepsiCo is one of the world’s leading food and beverage companies with more than $79 Billion in Net Revenue and a portfolio of 22 iconic brands, each generating over $1 Billion in annual retail sales. Our products are enjoyed in 200+ countries, powered by 250,000+ associates—game changers, mountain movers, and history makers—united by shared values and goals. At the heart of PepsiCo’s Europe transformation is the Spain Digital Hub's - part of the Strategy & Transformation (S&T) organization. Within Spain we have two digital hubs - one in Barcelona and other in Vittoria. At the core, these digital hubs are growth engine for


Build and scale technology solutions
Unlock efficiencies and drive productivity
Enhance effectiveness in core processes
Re imagine digital user experiences


We call this Winning with Purpose: delivering strong business results while making a positive impact on society and the environment.

Role Overview

The Data Science & AI Graduate at PepsiCo’s Vittoria - Digital Hub, Spain provides recent graduates with the opportunity to work on live DA&AI projects across diverse verticals, including:


Data science & AI
Machine learning


This role is designed to give students real-world exposure to cutting-edge technologies, helping them develop critical skills and laying the foundation for future careers at PepsiCo.

Responsibilities

Roles & Responsibilities

As an Data Science & AI Graduate, you will:


Work on real-time projects under guidance of mentors
Support design, development, and testing of technology solutions
Assist in analyzing requirements and documenting solutions
Collaborate with global teams on project modules
Researching and developing statistical and Machine Learning models
Implementing algorithms in Python and performing different experiments to validate that the models are fit for purpose
Making scalable data science pipelines


Why PepsiCo?

As an Data Science & AI Graduate at PepsiCo, you will:


Gain hands-on experience in digital transformation projects
Learn from industry leaders and global mentors
Work in an inclusive, innovative, and fast-paced environment
Build a strong pipeline for future full-time opportunities


What makes us different?


Hybrid working model: combination of remote and collaborative office experience to enable innovation
Flexible work schedule
Variety of benefits to support your physical, emotional and financial wellbeing
Professional growth possibilities & learning opportunities
Volunteering opportunities to help external communities
Space to be you to promote our Diversity & Inclusion strategy


We look forward to welcoming you to PepsiCo’s Data Science team and meeting you during interviews!

Qualifications

What We Are Looking For

We are seeking high-energy, passionate recent graduates within these areas:


A Bachelor or Master degree in STEM (Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, Statistics, Physics, Mathematics, other related majors may be considered)
Technology related experience a plus
Ability to learn new technologies and processes information quickly
Ability to adapt to changes in timelines and sequences
Excellent verbal and written communication skills


Minimum Qualifications - Each candidate is expected to:  


Hold a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree prior to the intended full time start date 
This position is limited to persons with right to work in Spain


Core Skills We Need


Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Solid foundation in programming (Python, PySpark & SQL)
Basic understanding of databases and querying
Teamwork and communication skills


Our ideal candidate is:


A self-starter with an eye for detail
Adaptable and flexible in a dynamic environment
Curious and eager to learn, innovate, and problem-solve

Title: Data Science
Description:
Job Description & Summary

At PwC, our people in data and analytics engineering focus on leveraging advanced technologies and techniques to design and develop robust data solutions for clients. They play a crucial role in transforming raw data into actionable insights, enabling informed decision-making and driving business growth.

Those in artificial intelligence and machine learning at PwC will focus on developing and implementing advanced AI and ML solutions to drive innovation and enhance business processes. Your work will involve designing and optimising algorithms, models, and systems to enable intelligent decision-making and automation.

Driven by curiosity, you are a reliable, contributing member of a team. In our fast-paced environment, you are expected to adapt to working with a variety of clients and team members, each presenting varying challenges and scope. Every experience is an opportunity to learn and grow. You are expected to take ownership and consistently deliver quality work that drives value for our clients and success as a team. As you navigate through the Firm, you build a brand for yourself, opening doors to more opportunities.

Skills

Examples of the skills, knowledge, and experiences you need to lead and deliver value at this level include but are not limited to:


Apply a learning mindset and take ownership for your own development.
Appreciate diverse perspectives, needs, and feelings of others.
Adopt habits to sustain high performance and develop your potential.
Actively listen, ask questions to check understanding, and clearly express ideas.
Seek, reflect, act on, and give feedback.
Gather information from a range of sources to analyse facts and discern patterns.
Commit to understanding how the business works and building commercial awareness.
Learn and apply professional and technical standards (e.g. refer to specific PwC tax and audit guidance), uphold the Firm's code of conduct and independence requirements.

Title: Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
We are looking for an experienced Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer to join an AI project.




Responsibilities

Design and implement a machine learning algorithm that learns from user selections (e.g., choosing A from a set of candidates A, B, C, D) to improve future predictions.
Develop an efficient solution to retrieve the most relevant candidates from a dataset containing millions of records.
Build, test, and optimize models for accuracy and performance.
Collaborate with the development team to deploy the solution into production.

Requirements

3+ years of experience in Data Science or Machine Learning.
Strong Python skills and experience with machine learning frameworks.
Experience with large-scale datasets and search/retrieval techniques.
Knowledge of recommendation systems, ranking algorithms, or similar ML applications.
Experience deploying ML models into production is a plus.

Title: Freelance Data Scientist (AI) - Remote
Description:
Freelance Data Scientist (AI) | Healthcare

Remote (EU)

Initial 6-month contract




—




We're currently supporting a large healthcare business that is looking to add an experienced Data Scientist to its team on an initial 6-month contract.




The role sits directly within a high-performing AI team and will focus on developing early-stage proofs of concept and prototypes across a range of cutting-edge AI initiatives.




You'll be working on projects involving:

Generative AI & LLMs
Agentic AI Workflows
Document Intelligence & Knowledge Extraction
RAG Applications
Advanced Machine Learning
Scientific & Research-Focused AI Use Cases




The team is seeing significant demand from stakeholders across the business and needs someone who can quickly turn ideas into working solutions.




---




What you’ll bring

PhD or strong academic background in a scientific discipline (Biology, Bioinformatics, Chemistry, Physics, Life Sciences, etc.)
Strong Python-based Data Science / Machine Learning experience
Commercial experience with LLMs, GenAI, RAG, or Agentic AI
Experience building POCs and prototypes
Cloud experience (ideally AWS)
Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills




Bonus

Databricks knowledge
Any experience within Pharma, Biotech, Healthcare, or Life Sciences.




If you'd like to hear more, hit the apply button 📧

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Ubicación:

Madrid, ES, 28046

Fecha de publicación: 16 jun 2026

¿Te defines por tu talento y tu visión?

Entonces, tú también puedes marcar la diferencia. Únete a un entorno profesional que contribuye a la transformación de empresas y sociedad. Alcanza tus metas, supera tus límites y únete a una firma que va más allá de los servicios profesionales.

Porque marcar la diferencia no es solo algo que decimos. Es lo que hacemos.

Desarrolla tu carrera con nosotros.

Desde el equipo de LIGHTHOUSE, nuestro centro de excelencia de Data & Analytics, Inteligencia Artificial & Tecnologías Emergentes, ayudamos a nuestros clientes a encontrar la eficiencia y el alto rendimiento en todas sus funciones TIC, tanto internas como externas hacia sus unidades de negocio y proveedores: buscando la máxima eficiencia en la operación de sus servicios y ajustando sus costes; así como incrementando su trascendencia en la cuenta de resultados y facilitando la innovación.

Actualmente, nos encontramos en proceso de crecimiento y estamos buscando Data Scientist para incorporar al equipo.

¿Qué podrás hacer?

El perfil de Data Scientist tiene como misión principal extraer valor del dato para apoyar la toma de decisiones estratégicas. Esto incluye:


Diseñar procesos de modelado de datos, algoritmos y modelos predictivos.
Interpretar datos crudos y extraer patrones significativos.
Desarrollar soluciones analíticas que impulsen el crecimiento y la competitividad.
Alinear la estrategia de datos con la estrategia corporativa.
Gestionar la entrega de información unificada para todas las áreas.
Participar en el gobierno del dato en arquitecturas complejas.


¿Qué necesitas saber?

Formación y experiencia:


Formación en Informatica, telecomunicaciones o carreras a fines.
Experiencia mínima de 2 a 5 años en roles de analista o científico de datos.
Formación complementaria en estadística, machine learning o inteligencia artificial.


Conocimientos técnicos:


Programación en Python, R, SQL, Spark.
Modelado de datos, series temporales, algoritmia.
Herramientas de visualización: Power BI, Tableau.
Plataformas cloud: Azure, AWS, Google Cloud.
Frameworks: Databricks, Hadoop.
Producción y mantenimiento de modelos de IA.
Preparación de modelos en entornos cloud.
Conocimientos en modelos analíticos: series temporales, redes neuronales, regresiones, grafos, ML.
Experiencia en Deep Learning.
Entornos Azure, arquitecturas Big Data (Spark, Databricks).


Soft skills:


Capacidad analítica y conceptual.
Interlocución con cliente y definición de requisitos funcionales.
Liderazgo técnico y mentoring de perfiles junior.
Ética en el uso de datos (cumplimiento normativo, confidencialidad)


Recomendable


Certificaciones como Azure AI Engineer, Power BI Data Analyst, Lakehouse Fundamentals.
Experiencia en proyectos internacionales.
Conocimiento en NLP, Computer Vision.
Participación en eventos de atracción de talento STEM (como STEMDRINK).


¿Qué valor añadido te podemos aportar?


Un gran ambiente de trabajo, tanto dentro como fuera de la oficina
Oportunidades internacionales y red de contactos global
Formacióncontinuay plan de carrera a tu medida
Salario competitivo y plan de remuneración flexible
31 días laborables de vacaciones
La tarde de tu cumpleaños libre
Flexibilidad y posibilidad de teletrabajo
Acceso a Kteam, nuestra plataforma de bienestar, servicios, solidaridad y promociones
Los beneficios pueden variar para programas de becas y/o prácticas.


Nuestro compromiso en KPMG es promover ambientes de trabajo en los que se trate con respeto y dignidad a las personas, garantizando la igualdad de oportunidades en su selección, formación y promoción ofreciendo un entorno de trabajo libre de cualquier discriminación por motivo de género, edad, discapacidad, orientación sexual, identidad o expresión de género, religión, etnia, estado civil o cualquier otra circunstancia personal o social. Y es que cada persona tiene un valor único y especial que aportar a la firma.

Nuestros valores marcan la diferencia. Marca la diferencia, impulsa tu talento.

Y es que cada persona tiene un valor único y especial que aportar a la firma.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
🌟 Join Impress – Europe’s Leading Health-Tech Innovator!

We're looking for a strong Machine Learning Engineer with 3+ years of hands-on experience and with deep fundamentals in ML algorithms and modeling. You'll design and ship models that drive decisions across our business — scoring, ranking, uplift, forecasting, recommendation, and NLP — owning each problem from formulation through production and measured impact. Our Data & ML team builds the models that power patient and operations decisions at Impress, Europe's largest orthodontic clinic chain, mining signal from patient communications. You'll have room to take these further and to open up new modeling directions as the business grows.




📢 Why we’re cool:




Work with an international and multicultural team
Competitive salary
Teeth aligner and whitening benefits
Collaborative work environment and positive culture
Opportunities to grow within a fast-paced, innovative company and real start-up experience with big challenges
Fresh fruits and healthy snacks at the office




🔥What You’ll Do:




Frame and solve diverse ML problems — classification, regression, ranking, uplift / causal modeling, forecasting, recommendation, anomaly detection, and some NLP processing.
Build models across the algorithmic spectrum — from gradient boosting and classical ML to deep learning (mostly inference) — choosing the right tool, not the trendy one.
Apply NLP / DL to unstructured data (text, conversations, communications): classification, intent detection, embeddings, summarization, information extraction.
Design experiments and A/B tests — define offline metrics and online success criteria, reason about baselines, causal effects, and statistical significance, and prove that models actually move the needle.
Own the full lifecycle — data extraction and feature engineering, training and evaluation, deployment, retraining, and monitoring for drift and data quality.
Set the technical bar — bring rigor to evaluation, guard against leakage and overfitting, and mentor on solid ML practice.




🔥Requirements:




Strong ML fundamentals: probability and statistics, optimization, bias/variance, regularization, model evaluation, and a real understanding of the algorithms behind the libraries.
Breadth of modeling experience: tree ensembles (boosting/bagging), linear models, clustering, and deep learning (CNNs/RNNs/transformers) — and the judgment to choose between them.
Experimentation: Familiarity with uplift / causal inference and experimentation, or a strong drive to master it.
NLP / LLM experience (embeddings, transformers, fine-tuning or prompting).
Technical Stack: Strong Python and the ML ecosystem (NumPy, pandas, scikit-learn; PyTorch or TensorFlow; gradient-boosting libraries).
Production Track Record: shipping models to production, not just notebooks — and measuring their impact.
Software Fundamentals: clean code, SQL, version control, testing.




💪Nice to have:




MLOps maturity: experiment tracking, CI/CD for models, feature stores, model monitoring.
Infrastructure: Cloud (AWS / GCP), data warehouses, orchestration (Airflow or similar), serving (FastAPI, Docker).
Community: Publications, competitions.




At Impress we cultivate a culture of inclusion and diversity. We celebrate our employees' individual strengths, views, and experiences and we encourage all candidates to apply, without regard to race, color, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, national origin, disability, or any other factor.🌈💪

Title: Data Scientist (Finance)
Description:
The Role




We're seeking a dynamic Data Scientist, ideally with strong financial fundamentals to join our team in Barcelona. You'll work at the intersection of data science and financial analysis, building models and insights that help business stakeholders make better decisions while acting as a steward of the organisation’s financial data. This is an opportunity to apply sophisticated analytical techniques to a business environment with unique characteristics and real-world impact.




Key Responsibilities

Oversee the complete data lifecycle, from data creation to data storage, usage, and deletion.
Understand the functional meaning of the data within datasets.
Manage data quality by selecting appropriate metrics, resolving data quality issues, and implementing improvement plans.
Support the organisation in understanding and correctly using data within their datasets.
Participate in data governance and policy implementation alongside business data owners.
Develop and maintain KPI dashboards and reporting tools that provide stakeholders with actionable insights into profitability, ARR, and cash flow.
Automate repetitive processes, including monthly closing routines and reconciliations.
Automate and maintain ARR calculations.
Build predictive and prescriptive models for financial forecasting, cost analysis, and business performance optimisation.
Analyse financial data and operational metrics to identify patterns, anomalies, and opportunities.
Communicate findings and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.




What We're Looking For

Required Qualifications

5+ years of professional experience in data science, analytics, or quantitative analysis.
Strong background in financial analysis and financial modelling, including a solid understanding of P&L statements, cash flow, and ARR metrics.
Proficiency in Python and SQL for data extraction and analysis.
Experience building and validating statistical models.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with excellent attention to detail.
Ability to communicate complex analyses to non-technical audiences.
Fluency in English; Spanish is desirable, and additional European languages are an advantage.




Nice to Have

Previous experience in restaurant technology, hospitality technology, or SaaS analytics.
Experience with Databricks.
Experience developing and maintaining data pipelines.

Title: DATA SCIENTIST – ANALYTICS BANKING
Description:
NTT Data somos todas las personas que la formamos. Un equipo de más de 139.000 profesionales, tan diverso cómo diversos son los 50 países en los que estamos presentes y los diferentes sectores en los que desarrollamos nuestra actividad; telecomunicaciones, entidades financieras, industria, utilities, energía, administración pública y sanidad.




¿Nuestra misión? Ofrecer soluciones tecnológicas, de negocio, estrategia, desarrollo y mantenimiento de aplicaciones, siendo un referente en consultoria. Todo gracias a la colaboración entre equipos, la calidad humana de nuestra gente y a que no nos conformamos con lo establecido, buscamos siempre la innovación que nos acerca al futuro.




Nuestra esencia nos ha llevado a la vanguardia de la tecnología, a romper paradigmas y a brindar las soluciones que realmente se corresponden a las necesidades de cada cliente. Nuestro talento nos ha hecho poder decir con orgullo que somos una de las 6 empresas TOP de tecnologías en el mundo.




Porque #Greattech, needs #GreatPeople, like you




¿Qué buscamos?




NTT DATA desea incorporar un perfil senior de Data Scientist para liderar proyectos de ciencia de datos en banca. Se busca experiencia en modelización avanzada, resolución de problemas de negocio complejos y liderazgo técnico dentro de equipos multidisciplinares.




Formación:

Ingeniería, Estadística, Matemáticas o similares.
Se valorará máster en Inteligencia Artificial, Ciencia del Dato o Big Data.




Experiencia:

Experiencia de 2 o más años en desarrollo de modelos predictivos y analítica avanzada en el sector financiero.




Conocimientos Requeridos:

Dominio de Python para ciencia de datos (scikit-learn, XGBoost, pandas).
Experiencia en data wrangling con PySpark.
Experiencia en validación de modelos, tuning y evaluación.
SQL avanzado y experiencia con grandes volúmenes de datos.
Desarrollo de pipelines de datos y modelado end-to-end.
Experiencia práctica con servicios de AWS (S3, SageMaker, Redshift, Glue).
Experiencia práctica en IA Generativa (embeddings, RAG, LLMs en banca).
Conocimiento en NLP.
Conocimientos básicos de control de versiones (Git).
Inglés avanzado.




Valorado:

MLOps (MLflow, Airflow), integración en producción.
Visualización de resultados para negocio (Power BI, Looker).




Deseable:

Certificaciones AWS en analítica o ML.
Participación en construcción de assets o frameworks de analítica reutilizables.




Soft Skills

Capacidad para liderar técnicamente y tomar decisiones informadas.
Visión estratégica y orientación al impacto de negocio.
Claridad para explicar hallazgos complejos a perfiles no técnicos.
Capacidad de mentoría a perfiles junior.
Actitud proactiva para detectar nuevas oportunidades de análisis.
Foco en entrega de valor, no solo en resultados técnicos.




¿Qué te ofrecemos?

Title: DATA SCIENTIST / SENIOR DATA SCIENTIST
Description:
Job description: NTT DATA is seeking a passionate Data Scientist / Senior Data Scientist to join our AI team. This is a fantastic opportunity to work alongside brilliant minds in data science, where you can learn and enrich yourself in a dynamic and innovative environment, leveraging cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence techniques to drive forward-thinking solutions in a company that's at the forefront of technological advancement.




Qualifications: Bachelor's or master's degree in mathematics, Statistics, Informatics Engineering, Economics, or Physics. Courses in Artificial Intelligence, Analytics, Big Data, or similar fields are a plus.




Experience: For junior: A minimum of 1 year of experience in Data Science or related fields. For senior: A minimum of 3 years of experience in Data Science or related fields.




Skills:

Required:
Machine Learning, optimization and advanced analytics techniques
Work with team members across multiple disciplines to understand the data
Descriptive and exploratory statistics applied to detecting patterns and trends in data.
Advanced knowledge in Python.
SQL and relational databases.
Visualization and communication with clients, mastering tools such as PowerBI, Tableau, Dash, Streamlit, etc.
Valuable:
Experience using Git
NLP, Generative AI, Deep Learning, methaeuristic algorithms
Experience working with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and their data services, including data storage, processing, and machine learning capabilities.
Big Data technologies: Spark, Big Query, Snowflake, Databricks, etc.




Key Responsibilities:

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business needs and translate them into data science projects.
Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and algorithms to solve complex business problems.
Conduct data analysis and visualization to communicate insights and recommendations to stakeholders.
Stay updated with the latest trends and advancements in data science and AI, and apply them to improve existing processes and solutions.
Mentor junior data scientists (for Senior positions) and contribute to a culture of continuous learning and improvement within the team.




Join our dynamic and passionate team at a leading technology and services company!

Send in your application and start making your mark on the future of the industry today!




At NTT Data, we believe everyone is unique and different, this is why we bet for an inclusive culture that recognizes and values diversity. We work day after day to create an environment in wich we can explore, live and enhance our own singularity.




#WeAreAllUnique #YouMakeUsUnique

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Who We Are

At Twilio, we’re shaping the future of communications, all from the comfort of our homes. We deliver innovative solutions to hundreds of thousands of businesses and empower millions of developers worldwide to craft personalized customer experiences.

Our dedication to remote-first work, and strong culture of connection and global inclusion means that no matter your location, you’re part of a vibrant team with diverse experiences making a global impact each day. As we continue to revolutionize how the world interacts, we’re acquiring new skills and experiences that make work feel truly rewarding. Your career at Twilio is in your hands.

We use Artificial Intelligence (AI) to help make our hiring process efficient. That said, every hiring decision is made by real Twilions!

See yourself at Twilio

Join the team as Twilio’s next Machine Learning Engineer.

About The Job

This position is to design and engineer AI powered features that makes every customer conversation smarter. As a Machine Learning Engineer on the Conversation Intelligence team, you'll develop and deploy solutions that extract meaning from voice and messaging data at Twilio scale. You'll work alongside experienced ML practitioners to ship real features - from model pipelines to production inference - that directly shape how businesses understand their customers.

Responsibilities

In this role, you’ll:


Design and development of machine learning solutions, ensuring accuracy, performance, security, and scalability.
Implement and maintain end-to-end AI/ML pipelines - from data ingestion and feature engineering through to model development, validation, and deployment with guidance from senior engineers on complex architectural decisions
Instrument AI/ML services with appropriate metrics, logging, and telemetry to monitor model performance and operational health against defined SLOs
Participate in on-call rotations, executing progressive rollouts and applying standard mitigation strategies to keep production inference services healthy
Collaborate across planning, design, and code review phases contributing to product and technical discussions, while helping raise overall code quality through thoughtful review feedback


Qualifications

Twilio values diverse experiences from all kinds of industries, and we encourage everyone who meets the required qualifications to apply. If your career is just starting or hasn't followed a traditional path, don't let that stop you from considering Twilio. We are always looking for people who will bring something new to the table!


Required:
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related quantitative field, or equivalent practical experience
2+ years of experience in machine learning engineering or applied ML, with demonstrated proficiency in Python and at least one ML framework (PyTorch, TensorFlow, or JAX) and familiarity with NLP libraries such as Hugging Face Transformers, NLTK, or SpaCy.
Experience developing, testing, and deploying small-to-medium scoped ML services or features in a collaborative engineering environment, including model versioning, experiment tracking, and cloud-based infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
Proficiency in Python (preferred) or similar OO language.
Experience utilizing Large (or Small) Language Models within software systems.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.


Desired


Hands-on experience with conversational AI, or LLM fine-tuning and prompt engineering in a production context
Exposure to agentic AI frameworks such as LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI
Familiarity with MLOps/LLMOps tooling related to maintaining models in production such as testing, versioning, model registry, retraining, and monitoring.


Location


This role will be remote from Spain.


Travel

We prioritize connection and opportunities to build relationships with our customers and each other. For this role, you may be required to travel occasionally to participate in project or team in-person meetings.

What We Offer

Working at Twilio offers many benefits, including competitive pay, generous time off, ample parental and wellness leave, healthcare, a retirement savings program, and much more. Offerings vary by location.

Twilio thinks big. Do you?

We like to solve problems, take initiative, pitch in when needed, and are always up for trying new things. That's why we seek out colleagues who embody our values — something we call Twilio Magic. Additionally, we empower employees to build positive change in their communities by supporting their volunteering and donation efforts.

So, if you're ready to unleash your full potential, do your best work, and be the best version of yourself, apply now! If this role isn't what you're looking for, please consider other open positions.

Twilio is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, reproductive health decisions, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, genetic information, political views or activity, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. We also consider qualified applicants with criminal histories, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law. Qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers and the California Fair Chance Act. Additionally, Twilio participates in the E-Verify program in certain locations, as required by law.

Title: Data Scientist Junior
Description:
Programa Talento Joven - Data Evolve • España (En remoto)




Descripción de la oferta En nuestro Programa Talento Joven buscamos personas recién tituladas en Formación Profesional o recién graduadas en universidad en informática, análisis de datos o programación, con interés en adquirir experiencia y conocimientos prácticos en el campo del Data Science y el análisis de datos.




Funciones:

Participar en un programa formativo de 30 semanas enfocado en habilidades técnicas y prácticas de análisis de datos
Trabajar sobre proyectos reales y simulaciones del entorno empresarial, incluyendo retos de predicción, análisis exploratorio y visualización de datos
Colaborar y aprender directamente de profesionales en activo que te acompañarán durante tu evolución
Practicar con herramientas como Python, SQL, Pandas, Power BI, Jupyter Notebooks y Scikit-learn
Aplicar procedimientos y buenas prácticas de análisis en entornos controlados de laboratorio




Lo que ofrecemos:

Plan formativo diseñado y actualizado según las necesidades reales del mercado laboral en data
Formación práctica, en grupo reducido, orientada al trabajo que se realiza en equipos de data science
Mentoring personalizado con especialistas del sector
Posibilidad real de entrevista para ofertas de empleo al finalizar el programa en empresas colaboradoras
Red de contacto con profesionales y exalumnos del programa




Requisitos:

Ciclo Formativo de Grado Medio o Superior relacionado con informática, análisis de datos o programación, o Grado universitario en Ingeniería Informática, Matemáticas, Estadística o disciplinas relacionadas con datos
Interés por el análisis de datos y motivación para afrontar retos prácticos
Capacidad para trabajar en equipo, comunicarte y aprender en un entorno técnico




Tipo de puesto: Formativo/Prácticas Ubicación: Modalidad híbrida (presencial y online)

Duración: 30 semanas Incorporación: Octubre 2026

Title: DATA SCIENTIST - MODELOS COMERCIALES
Description:
Descripción del puesto:



¿Qué proyectos desarrollamos?

Buscamos un Data Analyst para impulsar el desarrollo de la capa informacional de CaixaBank y aportar valor directo al negocio y a la dirección.

Tu misión será transformar datos - estructurados y no estructurados - en conocimiento útil que permita entender mejor el negocio, el mercado y nuestros clientes, así como identificar oportunidades de mejora y crecimiento.
Formarás parte de un equipo transversal y tendrá un rol clave como analista end‑to‑end, combinando análisis ad‑hoc, automatización de procesos, definición de KPIs, construcción de dashboards y participación activa en la migración de nuestros procesos y proyectos al entorno cloud.
Este rol es ideal para alguien con iniciativa, fuerte capacidad analítica, curiosidad y ganas de asumir un papel amplio y de impacto dentro del equipo.
 
Las responsabilidades son:

Gestión de la relación con los clientes (dirección y áreas de negocio).
Interlocución habitual con dirección y áreas de negocio para entender necesidades y traducirlas en soluciones basadas en datos.
Priorización y planificación de los proyectos y peticiones recurrentes.
Gestión de expectativas, seguimiento y comunicación de resultados.
Realización de proyectos en los que se aborda el ciclo completo de análisis de información.
Toma de requerimientos de información de negocio.
Exploración de datos en Datapool y/o fuentes externas. Desde la búsqueda hasta el tratamiento de los datos hasta generar la información necesaria.
Propuesta y generación de KPIs.
Construcción de los informes / análisis para presentar la información.
Comunicación de resultados a los clientes.
Diseño, elaboración, mantenimiento y automatización los procesos para seguimientos recurrentes o peticiones puntuales.

 

Para realizar estas funciones, será necesario:

Tener conocimientos técnicos para llevar a cabo los informes que se requieran desde negocio.
Tener cualidades analíticas que permitan entender la lógica de negocio y proponer nuevas ideas o estrategias que ayuden a impulsarlo.
Buenas habilidades de comunicación e interpersonales, así como creatividad y atención a los detalles en la visualización y comunicación de información.

Requisitos mínimos:

Estudios universitarios en ciencias o ingenierías.
Fuertes capacidades de análisis y gestión de datos, con uso de herramientas de análisis y explotación de Bases de datos: alto nivel en SQL, fluidez en Data Discovery y Análisis Estadísticos, Python, GIT, Airflow. Formación en lenguajes de programación.
Generación de dashboards con herramientas de visualización como QlikSense, Tableau, Looker, etc.
Nivel avanzado herramientas de ofimática (Excel, Power Point, etc).

¿Qué proyectos desarrollamos?

Buscamos un Data Analyst para impulsar el desarrollo de la capa informacional de CaixaBank y aportar valor directo al negocio y a la dirección.

Tu misión será transformar datos - estructurados y no estructurados - en conocimiento útil que permita entender mejor el negocio, el mercado y nuestros clientes, así como identificar oportunidades de mejora y crecimiento.
Formarás parte de un equipo transversal y tendrá un rol clave como analista end‑to‑end, combinando análisis ad‑hoc, automatización de procesos, definición de KPIs, construcción de dashboards y participación activa en la migración de nuestros procesos y proyectos al entorno cloud.

Title: Senior Data Scientist (AI & Synthetic Intelligence)
Description:
Who We Are



Cint is a pioneer in research technology (ResTech). Our customers use the Cint platform to post questions and get answers from real people to build business strategies, confidently publish research, accurately measure the impact of digital advertising, and more. The Cint platform is built on a programmatic marketplace, which is the world’s largest, with nearly 300 million respondents in over 150 countries who consent to sharing their opinions, motivations, and behaviours.



We are feeding the world’s curiosity!





Job Description



As a Senior Data Scientist at Cint, you will play a pivotal role in developing next-generation AI solutions that power our product portfolio. Collaborating closely with Product and Engineering teams, you will bridge the gap between traditional research data and synthetic intelligence. You will focus on the research, validation, and delivery of models—including Large Language Models (LLMs)—that augment high-quality human signals across the Cint Exchange. This role involves advanced data mining, robust data validation, and the development of sophisticated statistical and machine learning methodologies.



The ideal candidate can independently research, develop, and maintain high-impact solutions that align Cint’s AI capabilities with market research trends, directly influencing strategic decisions for Cint’s proprietary synthetic data platform.



Responsibilities



Lead the research, discovery, and development of machine learning models - specifically focused on synthetic row generation, open-ended text generation, and data augmentation.



Design and drive advanced statistical methods and complex experiments to validate LLM performance and synthetic modeling hypotheses.



Develop logic for on-demand and dynamic boosting capabilities, collaborating with Engineering to integrate these models into Cint Exchange fielding workflows.



Design and refine sophisticated profiling taxonomies, leveraging large-scale datasets to create syndicated audiences.



Independently manage complex project planning, development, and maintenance end-to-end with minimal supervision.



Partner with Product, Engineering and Strategy teams to align technical AI delivery with business goals, ensuring a seamless transition from MVP to scaled integration.



Create clear, effective prototypes and deliverables that explain and defend complex Generative AI concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.





Qualifications



Qualifications Required:



Minimum 5 years of experience in a Data Science capacity, with a track record of leading complex projects.



A Master's degree (or equivalent) in Statistics, Data Science, or a related quantitative field.



Deep understanding of Generative AI and LLMs, particularly for applications in text generation and data synthesis.



Advanced knowledge of statistical techniques: hypothesis testing, sampling theory, experimental design, and causal inference.



Strong knowledge of a variety of ML techniques (e.g., clustering, regression, neural networks, etc.) and their real-world trade-offs.



Expert proficiency in Python (DS/ML stack) and experience with frameworks used for LLM development and fine-tuning.



Advanced SQL skills and experience working with large-scale databases.



Ability to research and adopt new methods while mentoring junior colleagues on their application.



Essential Qualities:



Highly accountable self-starter and quick learner, consistently motivated to deliver high-quality, impactful results.



Strong data-driven mindset with the ability to translate abstract business requests into actionable AI initiatives and solutions.



Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain and defend complex AI concepts to non-experts.



Nice to Have:



Direct experience with Synthetic Data Generation techniques and the evaluation of synthetic data quality/utility.



Experience with Prompt Engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), or fine-tuning open-source LLMs for open-end generation.



Experience with probabilistic modeling, or advanced profiling techniques.



Familiarity with online market research or survey exchange platforms.



Experience using Databricks, Spark, or PySpark for large-scale workflows.





Additional Information







Our Values



Collaboration is our superpower



We uncover rich perspectives across the world
Success happens together
We deliver across borders.

Innovation is in our blood



We’re pioneers in our industry
Our curiosity is insatiable
We bring the best ideas to life.

We do what we say



We’re accountable for our work and actions
Excellence comes as standard
We’re open, honest and kind, always.

We are caring



We learn from each other’s experiences
Stop and listen; every opinion matters
We embrace diversity, equity and inclusion.





More About Cint



We’re proud to be recognised in Newsweek’s 2025 Global Top 100 Most Loved Workplaces®, reflecting our commitment to a culture of trust, respect, and employee growth.



In June 2021, Cint acquired Berlin-based GapFish – the world’s largest ISO certified online panel community in the DACH region – and in January 2022, completed the acquisition of US-based Lucid – a programmatic research technology platform that provides access to first-party survey data in over 110 countries.



Cint Group AB (publ), listed on Nasdaq Stockholm, this growth has made Cint a strong global platform with teams across its many global offices, including Stockholm, London, New York, New Orleans, Singapore, Tokyo and Sydney. (www.cint.com)







Additionally, in a world of AI, we want our candidates to understand our approach to the use of AI during the interview and hiring process, so we'd appreciate you reading our AI usage guide.
